## AI Disclosure
<!--- Be honest, this is about transparency, not gatekeeping. -->
- [ ] I did not use generative AI tools for this contribution.
- [ ] I used generative AI tools (e.g. Copilot, Claude, ChatGPT) to help draft this contribution, and a human has reviewed and tested every line before submitting.

## Types of Changes
<!--- What types of changes does your code introduce? Put an `x` in all the boxes that apply: -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue).
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality).
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected).

## Definition of Done Checklist:
<!--- Go over all the following points, and put an `x` in all the boxes that apply. -->
- [ ] I've read the [Contribution Guide](https://laradock.io/docs/contributing).
- [ ] I've run `shellcheck` / `hadolint` locally (same checks as CI) and they pass.
- [ ] I've updated the **documentation**. (refer to [this](https://laradock.io/docs/contributing/#update-the-documentation-site) for how to do so).
- [ ] I enjoyed my time contributing and making developer's life easier :)
